data.content: Planning complete. Key finding: current warning is for `knots-d816` latest worktree head event `019ca290-e32c-7ee1-a91e-07c4d4d4ad14`, which is missing `workflow_id` and `type`; the knot is absent from local cache, so the existing fix likely skips it while progress still reports fixed. Implement richer stale-head diagnostics, fallback repair from legacy head payload using sync's inference rules, and honest fixed/skipped accounting.
